nasb.text: Then the priest shall take the one male lamb and bring it for a guilt offering, with the log of oil, and present them as a wave offering before the Lord.

esv.text: And the priest shall take one of the male lambs and offer it for a guilt offering, along with the log of oil, and wave them for a wave offering before the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭司取一隻公羊羔，獻作贖愆祭，取三分之一公升油一同獻上；祭司把這兩樣當作搖祭，在耶和華面前搖一搖。

ccb.text: 并献上一只公羊羔和一杯油作赎过祭，作为摇祭在耶和华面前摇一摇。
